message:
test(mvcc): add 100-writer append-only merge proof stress test with structured progress

Add stress_merge_proof_append_only_conflicts_emit_structured_progress
test to the MVCC stress suite. 100 concurrent writers commit to the same
hot block using AppendOnly merge proofs with a shared 1-byte prefix and
unique per-writer tail bytes. Validates that all 100 commits succeed
without unnecessary FCW aborts, and that the final block contains the
seed byte followed by all 100 writer bytes in commit order.

Each commit emits a structured eprintln progress line (event, writer,
commit_seq, block) for debugging merge resolution under contention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
